title: cannotCalculateChanges replacement is correct and should not revert
description: The old changes/queryChanges behavior (returning all current IDs as 'created' when state changed) was actively wrong: a client merging that response with its cache would duplicate every object on every sync cycle. cannotCalculateChanges forces a clean refresh. A contributor might argue the old behavior was 'more helpful' — it wasn't; it was protocol-violating. The choice is correct.
